The '''Shinkai Abyss''' was a large trench at the bottom of one of the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Spira/Legends|Spira]]. It was approximately 150 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] deep and 3,000 miles long, and was the primary habit for the fearsome [[camray eel]]s.
